2606.23678.title: AIR: Adaptive Interleaved Reasoning with Code in MLLMs
2606.23678.paper_summary: Following the paradigm shift initiated by OpenAI o3, interleaved reasoning with code to enhance multimodal large language models (MLLMs) has become a pivotal research frontier. The existing literature focuses primarily on tool-use within vision-perception tasks. However, such approaches typically rely on predefined heuristics for visual manipulation and are inherently incapable of addressing numerical computation problems due to their exclusive focus on visual operations. This paper empowers MLLMs with adaptive interleaved reasoning capabilities through extended reinforcement learning training on code-augmented complex numerical computation tasks. To this end, we propose a comprehensive three-component solution consisting of: a two-stage cold-start data construction pipeline, data filtering strategies for RL dataset curation, and an adaptive tool-invocation strategy leveraging a group-constrained reward function for interleaved reasoning trajectories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that after Reinforcement Learning training with the group-constrained reward function, performance improves by an average of 6.1 percentage points (pp) on evaluation benchmarks. Specifically, the accuracy for interleaved reasoning samples increases by 9.9 pp, and the overall success rate of tool-use exceeds 95%. Our data and code are available at: https://github.com/CongHan0808/AIR.git.
2606.23678.paper_summary_zh: 隨著OpenAI o3所引發的範式轉變，交錯推理與代碼結合以增強多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）已成為一個關鍵的研究前沿。現有文獻主要集中在視覺感知任務中的工具使用。然而，此類方法通常依賴於預定義的啟發式方法進行視覺操作，並且因其專注於視覺操作而無法處理數值計算問題。本文通過對增強代碼的複雜數值計算任務進行擴展強化學習訓練，賦予MLLMs自適應的交錯推理能力。為此，我們提出了一個由三個組件組成的綜合解決方案，包括：一個兩階段的冷啟動數據構建管道、用於強化學習數據集策劃的數據過濾策略，以及利用群體約束獎勵函數的自適應工具調用策略，以支持交錯推理軌跡。廣泛的實驗表明，在使用群體約束獎勵函數進行強化學習訓練後，性能在評估基準上平均提高了6.1個百分點（pp）。具體而言，交錯推理樣本的準確率提高了9.9 pp，工具使用的整體成功率超過95%。我們的數據和代碼可在以下網址獲得：https://github.com/CongHan0808/AIR.git。
2606.23678.author: Cong Han et.al.
2606.23678.authors: Cong Han, Xiaohan Lan, Haibo Qiu, Yujie Zhong
